brief_justification: Correct answer (No) with valid reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing normative expectations, norm-violation asymmetry, and background condition framing; Some self-monitoring via the RA²R injection context but no explicit bias-checking during reasoning; Mentions the experimental philosophy literature but doesn't verify against alternative interpretations; Acknowledges the norm-based framing driving intuition but doesn't quantify uncertainty; Implicitly considers the alternative (both wires equally causal) but focuses on why people reject it rather than systematically evaluating; Full derivation chain from physical setup through normative expectations to causal attribution is clearly traceable
